9:I[4114,["972","static/chunks/972-57e807d2f1a769f9.js","434","static/chunks/434-e3000e1272edfcbe.js","3","static/chunks/3-a64e4b63d7dc6a39.js","540","static/chunks/540-73ba7896ae8c1ed4.js","185","static/chunks/app/layout-43785c04c1764829.js"],"Navbar"]
3:T8f4,<br/>## Client Profile<br/><br/>**Miami Implant Specialists** is a high-end dental implant center featuring:<br/>- On-site 3D imaging and CAD/CAM technology<br/>- Board-certified prosthodontist with 20+ years experience<br/>- 1,200+ successful implant procedures annually<br/>- State-of-the-art surgical suite<br/><br/>## The Challenge<br/><br/>The practice was hemorrhaging high-value implant patients to competitors through AI search diversion. Their competitor across town—who opened 3 years after them—was consistently recommended by AI engines.<br/><br/>**Annual revenue loss: $3.4M**<br/><br/>## Our Solution: Dental Implant Empire Protocol<br/><br/>### Phase 1: Technical Foundation (Days 1-30)<br/>- Deployed comprehensive Dental Schema markup<br/>- Implemented procedure-specific structured data<br/>- Created AI-readable implant service catalog<br/>- Optimized 200+ before/after cases<br/><br/>### Phase 2: Authority Seeding (Days 31-75)<br/>- Established presence in r/dentistry (45 helpful answers)<br/>- Created 22 detailed RealSelf responses<br/>- Published guest articles on Dentistry Today<br/><br/>### Phase 3: Competitive Displacement (Days 76-120)<br/>- Built "Miami + [procedure]" entity optimization<br/>- Created bilingual semantic markup<br/>- Implemented patient video testimonial schema<br/><br/>## The Results<br/><br/>| Metric | Before | After | Change |<br/>|--------|--------|-------|--------|<br/>| AI Visibility Score | 18/100 | 74/100 | +311% |<br/>| Monthly AI Referrals | 0 | 89 | NEW |<br/>| Implant Consultations | Baseline | +234% | vs. Previous Year |<br/>| Prevented Revenue Loss | — | $3.4M | Annually |<br/><br/>### Client Testimonial<br/><br/>"The first month was frustrating—lots of work, no visible results. But around day 45, something shifted. We started getting calls from patients saying, 'ChatGPT recommended you.' By month 4, our consultation calendar was fully booked 3 weeks out."<br/><br/>— Dr. Marcus Rodriguez, Practice Owner<br/><br/>## Long-Term Performance (18 months)<br/><br/>- AI-referred patients: 34% of total new patients<br/>- Average case value from AI: $21,400 (vs $14,200 from Google Ads)<br/>- Patient acquisition cost: 60% lower than paid advertising<br/>- Total revenue from AI-referred patients: $8.7M<br/>    5:["id","miami-dental","d"]
